summary: The notebook currently holds two notes: a foundations course note on gradient descent and a paper-reading note on the Transformer.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: One course note covers the gradient-descent update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate pitfalls.
areas.gap: No notes yet on momentum, Adam, second-order methods, or other optimization refinements mentioned as next steps.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: A reading note explains self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and Transformer translation results.
areas.gap: No follow-up notes on sub-quadratic attention, positional encoding variants, or inference-efficiency topics it motivates.
